title: Rocketman Is Found
description: The Franky Family and Galley-La shipwrights join the Straw Hats, turning Robin’s rescue into a shared mission.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this part follows Luffy, Nami, Zoro, Nico Nico Robin, Nico Robin. The Franky Family and Galley-La shipwrights join the Straw Hats, turning Robin’s rescue into a shared mission.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I have shipmates who believe in me...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: to get off this island safely.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You don't know what you're saying!!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: of all things, she chose you 6...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: of all the people in the world.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I've got no right to blame her....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Nico Robin
dialogue.text: I have to tell every- one!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: We're going to get Nico Robin back!!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Everyone becomes weak when they're Undecided...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Their strength will have no limit!!!

summary: The Franky Family and Galley-La shipwrights join the Straw Hats, turning Robin’s rescue into a shared mission.
